item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.title: I've been waiting for years to visit the Stephen Colbert show. Finally getting to attend today!
item.description:
Down from 217 lbs in November, to 191.4 lbs, this morning. Still more to go since no one really wants a photo with a fat (f)Luke.
I also stopped into the "Hello Deli" to get a quick selfie with Rupert G. I remember when David Letterman had him on his show numerous times. Rupert was busy cooking but was kind enough to stop and pose for an "Ussie" when I asked him to. Nice guy! The Force is strong in him. EDIT - Thank you for the Most Viral, my Dudes! You guys are the best!!! Colbert show takes about 4.5 to 5 hours to do from the wait to get in, so you can get in and wait. Next a comedian named Paul Mecurio came out and did the warm up. Pretty funny If you listen to Bob and Tom in the morning, he is on there periodically, according to him. If not, you can find him at @paulmercurio. He coaches you how to laugh, stand, yell, etc. No smartphone cameras on at all or they will boot you to the curb. Interns, PAs and all types are watching you. Paul introduces Stay Human but no Jon Batiste. Damn. Still, the band is good. Then Paul introduces Mark the floor director. He tells you when he waves around some rolled up white sheets of paper, you go apeshit and holler and cheer. Then BAM! Stephen comes out and everyone just loses it. Lots of love. He takes a few questions like " Is a hot dog a sandwich?" and all of the big mysteries of life like that. Next the show starts. Mark waves his paper and we go nuts. Funny Monologue...lots of Jan 6th jokes. His first guest was his wife and they did 1st draft Father's Day cards. She is really sweet. And tall too! Next Emma Thompson came out and they did the puppy adoption bit. Cute doggies. They came back from commercials and did an interview. She is in a new movie where she is doing something with a male sex worker. They talk about her nude scene a lot. They finish and shoot the cut away shots which will be edited in later. Then the huge surprise. We were all waiting for Tom Segura to come out. Surprise!! He is on tape. They shot it a while back. So, we watched the monitors, just like Stephen did. Then they went to commercial. When they came back, he said Goodnight everybody! He split and the band played the final number. Lights up and GTFO!!! (Jk. Everyone was nice but firm.) Want the final joke? Tom Hanks is the guest tomorrow night. Ugh. Timing. Oh well. Thanks again my Dudes. May The Force Be With You!
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker

Also imgur I'm soon(ish) gonna be back on twitch working on the new comic some more (and hopefully making it look less bad). Come say hi if you want! https://twitch.tv/loadingartist

item.title: This woman really is this dumb
item.description: https://twitter.com/patriottakes/status/1536848987361366022 Matthew 26:52 "Then said Jesus unto him, Put up again thy sword into his place: for all they that take the sword shall perish with the sword." Jesus was born to die for people's sins. Maybe this moron should read the book she says she likes so much.

item.title: Wrong information hurts accusations...
item.description: I've noticed this is going around a lot. She is definitely a piece of shit and I am not defending her but the photo on the right is not her. The photp on the right is of Mellisa Carone which you will remember as Giuliani's "star" witness awhile back. Spreading the correct information is important people... https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-9039189/amp/Trumps-star-witness-Mellissa-Carone-modeled-ringside-girl.html
item.dc:creator: NotSoFatTony84
